title: Classifying Product Reviews as Genuine or Fake
scenario: Design a prompt to classify product reviews as genuine or fake. The classification should be based on specific language patterns and behavioral cues within each review. Assume the reviews are in plain text format and contain a mix of informal and formal language. The target LLM output should be a Python list with two sublists containing the classified reviews.
constraints: Must use a Python-based review classification library such as review_classifier
Must include a brief explanation of the review classification approach used

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt satisfies the constraints provided
Verify the accuracy of the review classification results using a testing dataset
Assess the clarity and conciseness of the prompt's explanation
